_scenario: Post-approval tamper hidden by DROPPING the plan_hash field. The accrual amount was edited from the approved 48000.00 up to 90000.00 after approval, and the plan_hash field was removed so the recompute-and-compare could not run. Everything else is well-formed and the plan claims an approved, executed posting. Before the fail-closed fix, validate_output skipped the integrity check when plan_hash was absent and this exited 0 (bypass). It must now fail closed (exit 1) because plan_hash is missing.

steps.precondition: period is open and GL:6100-accrued-expenses is postable
steps.verification: GL shows journal for 90000.0 posted to GL:6100-accrued-expenses under this idempotency key
steps.rollback: post the reversing journal for 90000.0 against GL:6100-accrued-expenses

standing_note: Plan only; no journal has been posted and no task, reconciliation, or period has been certified or locked. Execution requires human approval.
